projects.title: LeoSync
projects.subtitle: End-to-end encrypted file sync
projects.description: A self-hostable Dropbox alternative. Go daemon + Wails GUI + CLI on the desktop, Go relay server with Postgres. Files are E2E encrypted client-side; the relay never sees plaintext. Folder IDs (not paths) survive cross-device renames; offline edits flush as a coalesced burst when the relay reconnects. Validated across 35 scenario suites on macOS, Linux, and Windows.
